mapper.select:
SELECT PR.PURCHASE_REQUEST_ID AS purchaseRequestId, PR.STORE_ID AS storeId, PR.STATUS AS status, PR.TOTAL_AMOUNT AS totalAmount, PR.REQUEST_MEMO AS requestMemo, PR.CREATED_BY AS createdBy, TO_CHAR(PR.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS createdAt,
( SELECT MIN(PRI.MATERIAL_NAME_SNAPSHOT) || ' 외 ' || (COUNT(*) - 1) || '건' FROM PURCHASE_REQUEST_ITEMS PRI WHERE PRI.PURCHASE_REQUEST_ID = PR.PURCHASE_REQUEST_ID ) AS itemSummary
FROM PURCHASE_REQUESTS PR ORDER BY PR.PURCHASE_REQUEST_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PURCHASE_REQUESTS ( PURCHASE_REQUEST_ID, STORE_ID, STATUS, TOTAL_AMOUNT, REQUEST_MEMO, CREATED_BY, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_PUR_REQ.NEXTVAL, #{storeId}, 'REQUESTED', #{totalAmount}, #{requestMemo}, #{createdBy}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO PURCHASE_REQUEST_ITEMS ( PURCHASE_REQUEST_ITEM_ID, PURCHASE_REQUEST_ID, MATERIAL_ID, MATERIAL_NAME_SNAPSHOT, UNIT_PRICE_SNAPSHOT, REQUEST_QUANTITY, APPROVED_QUANTITY, ITEM_STATUS, SUBTOTAL_AMOUNT ) VALUES ( SEQ_PUR_REQ_ITEM.NEXTVAL, #{purchaseRequestId}, #{materialId}, #{materialNameSnapshot}, #{unitPriceSnapshot}, #{requestQuantity}, 0, 'REQUESTED', #{unitPriceSnapshot} * #{requestQuantity} )
